banner: 100% Free · 8 Phases · 120+ Resources · $0 Cost · Zero Paywalls
subtitle: A complete, self-paced path from programming basics to production backend engineer — 8 phases, 120+ hand-curated free resources, Python & Node.js focus, a 16-month study schedule, and career prep. $0 cost. No paywalls. No compromises.
